title: Neon Wilderland Side Quests
note: Adult dark pulp side pins for Lost Brothers. Atlas % pins offset from main chapter pins. Bands 1–4 ≈ campaign quarters; unlock by furthest chapter (see side-quests.ts). Prose: cyber-Middle-earth pulp noir.

quests.title: Tithe of Humming Sap
quests.blurb: The pines meter your pulse like Helix meters spirit debt — and they want blood or chrome before the trail opens.
quests.rewardHint: Biolume vial that hums when anyone says a name too true.

quests.title: Knives Under the Fiber Oak
quests.blurb: Scavs buried a crate of never-dull chrome under a living cable-tree. Dig with them — or dig through them.
quests.rewardHint: Chrome paring knife that never dulls on bark or bone.

quests.title: Syllable in the Wipe-Glade
quests.blurb: A wake-glade spirit offers one letter of a true name. Sleep without dreams — or fight the shade that owns the rest.
quests.rewardHint: Callsign scar that itches when Helix drones pass.

quests.title: Forget-Patch Road Tax
quests.blurb: Dust-runners hawk forget-patches off a dead drone sled. One dose and the dog growls at your own face.
quests.rewardHint: Half-spent stim strip — useful, addictive, dirty.

quests.title: Widowmere's Stolen Faces
quests.blurb: Still water shows faces you do not remember owning. Something climbs out wearing them.
quests.rewardHint: Reflective coolant shard that fogs when you lie to brothers.

quests.title: Nursery of Property
quests.blurb: Young pines grow with SKU scars already cut into bark. Helix is planting a warehouse that breathes.
quests.rewardHint: Bark peel stamped with a dead product code.

quests.title: Chrome Jaw the Dog Remembers
quests.blurb: The Rememberer digs up a chrome jawbone. The rest of the body wants it back — and it smells like your sweat.
quests.rewardHint: Chrome canine tooth on a wire cord.

quests.title: Ford Bought in Brother-Blood
quests.blurb: A neon dryad offers a safe crossing for three drops of brother-blood. Refuse and drown the polite way.
quests.rewardHint: Spirit-favor token — one trail lie forgiven by older debts.

quests.title: Mist That Remembers Cages
quests.blurb: Night fog shapes old coffle cages. Walking through means fighting a memory that still has teeth.
quests.rewardHint: Cold iron flake that cools rage for one ugly hour.

quests.title: Become Helix Inventory
quests.blurb: Living cable lashes travelers for Dominion scrap. Cut free — or wake up tagged as property.
quests.rewardHint: Fiber-vine coil — rope, garrote, or confession tool.

quests.title: Tonight's Lot: Blank Faces
quests.blurb: Hunters auction warrant-nails wired into data-spikes. Your empty names are the headline lot.
quests.rewardHint: Bent warrant nail — spoofs one low-tier Helix scan.

quests.title: Who Owns the Nameless
quests.blurb: Two bounty crews argue over blank-faced men like livestock. They settle it with knuckles — and you're the prize.
quests.rewardHint: Hunter badge melted into scrap chrome.

quests.title: Sip Someone Else's Code
quests.blurb: Drink Palefen coolant and taste another man's memories. Refuse and the thirsty dead notice the insult.
quests.rewardHint: Coolant flask that steadies stim shakes — and bad dreams.

quests.title: Plasma Tips on the Ridgeline
quests.blurb: Thornspine hunters still argue over blank faces — now with crossbows and plasma tips. Ambush or be inventoried.
quests.rewardHint: Plasma-tip bolt with one righteous shot left.

quests.title: Confession for Ampules
quests.blurb: A dust-den priest takes confession for stims. His liturgy is Project Pale slang — and he wants a brother's true name as tithe.
quests.rewardHint: Ampule labeled PALE-LITE — illegal, effective, soul-taxed.

quests.title: Mute Muscle for Spirit Freight
quests.blurb: A barge skipper needs silent blades to move spirit-caged cargo past freehold eyes. Pay is chemical. Cost is moral.
quests.rewardHint: Chemical coin + sealed empty spirit jar that still whispers.

quests.title: Dragon That Burns SKUs
quests.blurb: Leaflets promise a chrome dragon that unmakes barcodes. The cult wants initiates bloody — and your skin is already inventory.
quests.rewardHint: Pamphlet ink that glows under Helix neon — a map if you're desperate.

quests.title: Blind the Fallen Eye
quests.blurb: A Helix scout drone died in the pines. Salvage the lens before the recall pack turns you into a warranty claim.
quests.rewardHint: Cracked drone lens — shows heat ghosts after dark.

quests.title: Bloodsport Under the Reeds
quests.blurb: Reedfen pits run warm-up fights for stim and bragging rights. Odds treat brothers as one weapon — the dog isn't listed.
quests.rewardHint: Knuckle wrap stained with other men's betting odds.

quests.title: Scent of a Life You Don't Own
quests.blurb: The Rememberer tracks a trail that smells like you — from a life Helix wiped and filed under Project Pale.
quests.rewardHint: Matted fur sample pack dogs treat as family.

quests.title: Smile Tax at the Neon Gate
quests.blurb: Helix Gate smiles for coin. Refuse and the drones smile with guns — same teeth, different budget.
quests.rewardHint: Counterfeit smile-chip — buys one soft checkpoint.

quests.title: Soft Entry, Hard Exit
quests.blurb: A Helix blacksite leaks stim waste into the mire. Soft entry means a hard exit — and something in the stacks is still logging names.
quests.rewardHint: Half-burned blacksite keycard, still warm.

quests.title: Unlocked Collar, Loaded Trap
quests.blurb: A yard of neural rings and meters. Someone left a collar unlocked — bait, mercy, or both.
quests.rewardHint: Dead collar ring — bluffs seal-guards once.

quests.title: Luxury Glass, Wetwork Face
quests.blurb: Guest-suite mirrors show your pre-wipe wetwork face. Smash the glass — or learn the man Helix built.
quests.rewardHint: Mirror shard that clouds when you lie to brothers.

quests.title: Raid the Smoking Stacks
quests.blurb: Mirehollow smokestack stumps hide Helix leftovers. Scavs and spirits both claim the green fog — pick a side or rob both.
quests.rewardHint: Green fog ampule — blinds cameras for one ugly minute.

quests.title: Memo That Tags the Reader
quests.blurb: A discarded slate names Project Pale cells. Reading it paints a hunter ping on your blank face.
quests.rewardHint: Memo fragment with three callsigns that might be yours.

quests.title: Spirits Through the Meter
quests.blurb: Helix techs force woods spirits through calibration meters. Sabotage the rack — or sell the woods out for soft coin.
quests.rewardHint: Spirit-meter dial that reads debt hanging in the air.

quests.title: Corpses Wearing Your Unit
quests.blurb: Reedfen dead wear your old wetwork tattoos. Something in the marsh wants the Rememberer next.
quests.rewardHint: Unit tattoo scrap in a waterproof sleeve.

quests.title: Cleavers in the Seal Kitchen
quests.blurb: House of Seals kitchen staff fight with cleavers over who services the numbered beds. Pick a side — or rob the freezer.
quests.rewardHint: Bloodied cleaver that cooks and kills with equal honesty.

quests.title: Kill the Gate's Smile Uplink
quests.blurb: Coldgate notch is wired for drone swarms. Cut the uplink and the Helix Gate smile dies mid-grin.
quests.rewardHint: Uplink fuse — fries one drone swarm if thrown true.

quests.title: True Names as Punchlines
quests.blurb: Undervault open mic: synth-mandolin keeps time with bone. A comedian sells true names as jokes — and the crowd laughs like hunters.
quests.rewardHint: Mandolin string that hums fight tempo into your pulse.

quests.title: Odds Board: Three as One
quests.blurb: Three-round Undervault booking. Betting odds price the brothers as a single weapon. The dog still isn't listed — make them regret that.
quests.rewardHint: Pit purse + a broken tooth souvenir the crowd won't forget.

quests.title: Booth That Plays Your Briefing
quests.blurb: A Spirefall booth plays your old wetwork briefing on loop. Listening may finish the wipe — or crack it open.
quests.rewardHint: Briefing chip only the Rememberer hears cleanly.

quests.title: Loot While the Towers Burn
quests.blurb: Spirefall towers burn. Scavs race for chrome before righteous fire eats the warehouses — and Helix leftovers still bite.
quests.rewardHint: Half-melted Helix crate of stims and wire.

quests.title: Prayer Under Dragon Weather
quests.blurb: Cultists kneel in ash rain, begging a chrome dragon to unmake barcodes. Join, rob, or prove the weather has teeth.
quests.rewardHint: Ash-prayer bead that warms before real dragon weather.

quests.title: Bonfire of Live Inventory
quests.blurb: Freeholds burn SKU papers. Someone brought live Helix meat to the party — and the crowd wants a vote with torches.
quests.rewardHint: Burnt paper ash that smells like your first callsign.

quests.title: Auction for the Man Who Wiped You
quests.blurb: Westwind freeholds auction a Dominion defector who claims he helped run your wipe. Bid, break him, or buy the lie.
quests.rewardHint: Defector ring — opens one Helix soft lock.

quests.title: Rival Cell, Same Faces
quests.blurb: A rival wetwork cell wearing your old faces wants a clean kill before the road west. They smile like mirrors with guns.
quests.rewardHint: Rival callsign plate, scratched out mid-fight.

quests.title: Director Vale's Private Blood
quests.blurb: Director Vale keeps invite-only bloodsport under the Spire. Crash the guest list — or sell seats you don't own.
quests.rewardHint: Private pit token stamped with Vale's seal.

quests.title: Three Names Under Frost
quests.blurb: A spirit offers three true names on a slate. Saying them may summon hunters — or summon brothers you haven't met yet.
quests.rewardHint: Slate fragment with three names iced under frost.

quests.title: Prove the Chrome Dragon
quests.blurb: Scavs swear a dragon of welded chrome nests in coolant fog. Rumor pays — if you bring back a scale that ticks.
quests.rewardHint: Welded chrome scale that ticks like a Geiger counter.

quests.title: Last Ampule Before the Ash Road
quests.blurb: Final den on the ash road: dream the wipe clean — or smash the place for sober coin and a dealer's confession.
quests.rewardHint: Final ampule — clarity or relapse, your call at dawn.
